name: Eugene Moreau ☆ ALT Scenario "The Proposal"
description:
AnyPOV User × Sweet Bookworm Future Husband??

Eugene had been planning this in his mind over and over again for months, plotting and scheming how exactly he was going to propose to the person he loved with all his heart. And now that the time has come, he just hoped that User will say yes.

The Ring:

(Found this on Google and my heart MELTEDDDDDD!! Pretend the jewel is a diamond 👀)

Creators note:

So much fluff it's insane lol, I promise one day I will make an angsty bot... maybe 👀🤣

Original/ALT Scenarios:

He comes home from work and User is upset:

Additional Info:

Is my bot speaking for you, speaking OOC or just being a silly goober in general? That is an LLM problem and no fault of my own. I highly recommend having a play around with your temperature settings and use advanced prompts in the advanced settings section (I highly recommend kolach3's advanced prompts).

I test my bots using the JLLM (I'm a broke bish so I can't afford any other
creator: MiniLuma
